'''Ord Vorra''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who served as a food service tech in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. She was stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. She developed a romance with the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Biggs Bogan]], which was helped by their mutual interest of playing [[Strag]]. The [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Kaird]] used this fact to his advantage. Kaird adopted the false identity of Mont Shomu and asked the couple to watch a holoprojection of a strag championship. While watching the strag competition, Kaird poured wine poisoned with [[myocaine]]. Fifteen minutes later, Vorra and Bogan were paralyzed, and the Human was forced to tell all codes for use of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Erel Kersos]]' private [[Starship/Legends|ship]].

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}}
